description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to develop and master branches and on pull requests. The workflow should have two jobs: one for Unix-based systems (Linux and macOS) and one for Windows. The Unix job should use a matrix strategy to run on both Linux and macOS, install dependencies, cache and retrieve Boost and ccache, and then build and test the project using CMake. The Windows job should install dependencies, build and test the project using CMake, and then create an installer and upload artifacts.
